title: Rapper Offset Shot and Hospitalized in Florida: He Is ‘Stable and Being Closely Monitored,’ Says Rep
summary: Rapper Offset was shot in Hollywood, Florida on Monday and is currently being treated at a hospital. Fortunately, he is in stable condition and is under observation for his gunshot wound. A spokesperson has confirmed the incident and stated that Offset is receiving medical care.
wiki_context: Kiari Kendrell Cephus, known professionally as Offset, is an American rapper, singer, and songwriter. He is best known for being a member of the Atlanta-based hip-hop trio Migos. Formed with fellow rappers Quavo and Takeoff in 2008, the group released four commercially successful studio albums—Yung Rich Nation (2015), Culture (2017), Culture II (2018) and Culture III (2021)—before disbanding in 2023.
enriched_summary: Rapper Offset, a member of the formerly popular hip-hop trio Migos, was shot in Hollywood, Florida on Monday and is currently being treated at a hospital. Fortunately, he is in stable condition and is under observation for his gunshot wound. As a prominent figure in the music industry, known for hits like "Culture" and "Bad and Boujee," Offset's recovery is being closely followed by fans and fellow artists. With a successful career spanning over a decade, Offset has established himself as a talented artist, and his incident has sent shockwaves through the entertainment industry. A spokesperson has confirmed the incident, ensuring that Offset is receiving the necessary medical care.
